ABOUT.RESUME:
I am a {{years_old}} years old aerospace & astronautics engineer with about {{experience}} years of experience in the field.
I had passion for rockets and space when I was a kid and it grew into a aerospace career. Now I’m focused on building rockets, space tech, R&D and having fun and sense of fulfilment in my professional journey.
